meta.title: No Gym Club
meta.description: The street is my gym. Adaptive training guided by sport science.

landing.manifesto: Discipline over motivation. Action over comfort. Brutal, silent progress.

dashboard.idleHint: Today's workout is waiting for you.
dashboard.error: Failed to generate session. Please try again.

session.completeMessage: Go back to the dashboard to log your RPE.

equipment.title: Available equipment
equipment.hint: Select all the equipment you have access to.

parq.title: Safety Screening (PAR-Q)
parq.description: Answer honestly. If you answer YES to any question, we recommend consulting a doctor before continuing.
parq.q1: Have you ever been diagnosed with a heart condition?
parq.q2: Do you feel chest pain during exercise?
parq.q3: Have you had dizziness or loss of consciousness in the last month?
parq.q4: Do you have a joint or muscle injury that could worsen with exercise?
parq.q5: Do you have uncontrolled high blood pressure?
parq.q6: Has a doctor told you to avoid physical exercise?
parq.q7: Is there any other reason you should consult a doctor before starting?
parq.blocked: PAR-Q not cleared. Please consult a doctor before continuing with the training program.

test.pushupsHint: Do as many consecutive push-ups as you can with good form. Chest touches ground, arms fully extend.
test.pullupsHint: Do as many consecutive pull-ups as you can. Chin over bar, arms fully extend at bottom.
test.squatsHint: Do as many consecutive squats as you can. Thighs parallel to ground, back straight.
test.dipsHint: Do as many consecutive dips as you can on parallel bars. Elbows at 90°, arms fully extend at top.
test.plankHint: Hold the plank position as long as possible. Body straight, core tight, on forearms.
